body.contents:
IF YOU FAIL TO FOLLOW THE FOLLOWING RULES, YOU WILL BE BANNED:

1. no grieving
2. no stealing
3. no friendly fire (dammaging or causing physical or mental harm to a player on your team)
4. if you find a banana, don't eat it
5. to confirm you have eread the rules, type llama into the text box below
6. no leaving totattack other players/teams bases until the final day (i'm talking to you Ford). 
7. unless we say so, no closing you computer and leaving minecraft unless you have a good reoson (ex. using the bathroom, getting water) (this one was because of liam)

no.label: I SOLEMLEY SWEAR I AM UP TO NO GOOD
